commands.author: aaajiao

target.title: feat(opencode): Zen provider ships no model catalog ŌĆö every Zen model must be hand-registered (opencode-go discovers, opencode does not)
target.body:
## Summary

The bundled **`opencode` (Zen)** provider plugin ships **no model catalog**, so every Zen model a user wants must be hand-declared in `models.providers.opencode.models[]` with full routing (`api` + `baseUrl` + per-model metadata). The sibling **`opencode-go`** plugin does *not* have this problem ŌĆö it bundles `extensions/opencode-go/provider-catalog.ts` with both a static seed and **live discovery** against `https://opencode.ai/zen/go/v1/models`.

## Evidence (v2026.6.6)

| | `extensions/opencode-go/` | `extensions/opencode/` (Zen) |
|---|---|---|
| `provider-catalog.ts` | Ō£ģ present | ŌØī absent |
| `index.ts` `catalog.run` / `augmentModelCatalog` / `resolveDynamicModel` | Ō£ģ wired | ŌØī none |
| `openclaw.plugin.json` `modelCatalog` | ŌĆö | `null` (`models: NO`, `defaultModels: null`) |

The Zen models endpoint exists and mirrors the Go one:

- `GET https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/models` ŌåÆ **HTTP 200**, OpenAI-style `{data:[ŌĆ”]}`, **48 models** (`claude-fable-5`, `claude-opus-4-8`, ŌĆ”, `gpt-5.5`, `gemini-3.5-flash`, `grok-ŌĆ”`, `deepseek-ŌĆ”`, etc.).
- Per-model payload is **IDs only** (`{id, object, created, owned_by}`) ŌĆö no cost/context, same as the Go endpoint, so a static metadata seed is still needed for rich fields.

## Impact / repro

1. Configure `agents.defaults.model.primary: "opencode/claude-opus-4-8"` (or any Zen model) **without** a `models.providers.opencode.models[]` entry ŌåÆ `model_not_found`.
2. Add only `{ "id": "...", "name": "..." }` (no `baseUrl`) ŌåÆ request **silently misroutes to `platform.openai.com`** and the Zen key 401s. (The *error message* for this was improved in #89192 / #91292, but the underlying "you must hand-register Zen models" remains.)

## Proposed fix

Port the `opencode-go` pattern to the `opencode` plugin:

- Add `extensions/opencode/provider-catalog.ts` ŌĆö Zen base URL(s) + `OPENCODE_MODELS_ENDPOINT = https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/models`, a static metadata seed, and `buildStaticŌĆ”` / `buildLiveŌĆ”ProviderConfig` (via `buildLiveModelProviderConfig`) / `listModelCatalogEntries` / `resolveModel` / `normalizeBaseUrl`.
- Wire `extensions/opencode/index.ts`: `catalog: { order, run }` (static when no discovery key, live otherwise), `augmentModelCatalog`, `resolveDynamicModel`, and the `normalize*` hooks ŌĆö mirroring `opencode-go`.

## Questions before I send a PR

1. Is the missing Zen catalog **intentional** (Zen as a user-curated proxy) or an oversight?
2. If a PR is welcome, what **seed scope** do you prefer ŌĆö the full live catalog seeded statically (48 models, more pricing upkeep), a curated headline subset (e.g. the Claude family) with live discovery covering the rest, or live-discovery-only with a minimal seed?
3. Any reason the live `/zen/v1/models` discovery shouldn't be enabled by default for Zen the way it is for Go?

Happy to send the PR once you confirm direction. I have the port largely worked out against `opencode-go`.
target.author: aaajiao
